verification.note: Reported by the MoEformer (Wang, Xie, Mu, Liu, Zhao, Zhang, 'Mixture-of-Experts Transformer for Automatic Modulation Recognition', arXiv:2606.09085, Jun 2026) authors, NOT reproduced or re-run by this repo. The 0.6374 is the paper's FULL-SNR-RANGE average accuracy_overall on RadioML 2016.10a (11-class, -20..+18 dB) (verbatim from its results table, NOT a high-SNR peak). Same dataset + same full-SNR-range accuracy_overall metric as our canonical split, which is why it is 'from_paper' (same precedent as the existing tldnn_paper/iqfm_paper rows). The paper uses a 60/20/20 train/val/test ratio (ours is 80/10/10) and does not publish sample indices, so byte-level overlap with our split is not confirmed -- only the dataset + protocol match. Literature reference point, never conflated with an in-repo reproduced number. New specialized SOTA on 2016.10a, above the on-board tldnn_paper (0.6283). Model size: n_params=187730 (high confidence — MoEformer paper (Wang et al., 'Mixture-of-Experts Transformer for Automatic Modulation Recognition', arXiv:2606.09085), Table II, 'Params (K)' header, MoEformer…)
